infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Wasselni Driver needs camera access to capture photos of your driver's license, vehicle registration, insurance, and a selfie for identity verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Wasselni Driver needs access to your photo library to upload document images for onboarding and verification.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Wasselni Driver uses your location to show nearby ride requests and navigate to pickups while you are online.

plugins.photosPermission: Wasselni Driver needs access to your photos to upload document images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Wasselni Driver needs camera access to capture documents and selfies for verification.
Wasselni Driver needs camera access to capture documents and selfies for verification.
